response.global_analysis: The video features two songs: 'Hitamuki Cinderella!' and 'Oto Melody'. The provided Reference JSON only contained a snippet of the first song's lyrics. I have prioritized the on-screen burnt-in lyrics as the primary source for transcription and timing, as they accurately reflect the extended performance in the video. Vocal audio dictating start and end times for all entries.

subtitles.original: 誰よりあなたのトクベツでいたいの
subtitles.english: I want to be your most special person of all.

subtitles.original: あたしひたむきシンデレラ！
subtitles.english: I'm a dedicated Cinderella!

subtitles.original: どんな道が待ってても
subtitles.english: No matter what road awaits me,

subtitles.original: ガラスのヒールで駆けてくよ
subtitles.english: I'll run through it in glass heels.

subtitles.original: 魔法が解けても醒めない夢を
subtitles.english: A dream that never ends, even if the magic breaks,

subtitles.original: あなたにあげるわ
subtitles.english: I'll give it to you.

subtitles.original: だから絶対 負けない！
subtitles.english: So I definitely won't lose!

subtitles.original: 弱気お断り
subtitles.english: No room for cowardice.

subtitles.original: 純愛したい まっすぐに
subtitles.english: I want a pure love, straight and true.

subtitles.original: 想うエンパシー 伝わっちゃうくらい
subtitles.english: An empathy so strong it's transmitted,

subtitles.original: 本気だもん
subtitles.english: I'm serious, after all.

subtitles.original: まさしく無敵ですっ
subtitles.english: I'm truly invincible!

subtitles.original: Ah ハマってハマっていいよ
subtitles.english: Ah, it's okay to fall for me, fall for me.

subtitles.original: ねえ ディグってディグってギュンと
subtitles.english: Hey, dig me, dig me, until your heart thumps.

subtitles.original: 恋する乙女は変幻自在
subtitles.english: A girl in love is ever-changing.

subtitles.original: 「キレイ」も「キューティー」も欲張りに励めば
subtitles.english: Striving for both 'beauty' and 'cuteness' greedily,

subtitles.original: 輝く自分になるの
subtitles.english: I'll become a radiant version of myself.

subtitles.original: さあ！ ハマってハマっていいよ
subtitles.english: Come on! It's okay to fall for me, fall for me.

subtitles.original: ねえ 気づいて気づいてちゃんと
subtitles.english: Hey, notice me, notice me properly.

subtitles.original: まだまだ乙女は日進月歩
subtitles.english: A girl is still making steady progress.

subtitles.original: 世界で一番のドキドキがほしいの
subtitles.english: I want the world's greatest heart-pounding moment.

subtitles.original: あなただけへのプリンセスですっ
subtitles.english: I'm a princess just for you!

subtitles.original: Ah 「好き」って「好き」ってなんで
subtitles.english: Ah, why is it that saying 'I love you'...

subtitles.original: そう ズキってズキって言うの
subtitles.english: ...makes my heart throb and ache?

subtitles.original: けなげなココロは困惑中
subtitles.english: My brave heart is currently confused.

subtitles.original: 愛しさ膨らんでこんなにも苦しいの
subtitles.english: My love swells up and it's so painful.

subtitles.original: 今すぐこっちに微笑んで
subtitles.english: Please smile at me right now.

subtitles.original: Ah バズっちゃバズっちゃやぁだ
subtitles.english: Ah, I don't want it to go viral, go viral.

subtitles.original: ねえ かまってかまってもっと
subtitles.english: Hey, pay attention to me, more and more.

subtitles.original: 誰もがあなたを狙っちゃう
subtitles.english: Everyone will be after you.

subtitles.original: ウインクひとつでメロメロにさせちゃって
subtitles.english: Making them head over heels with a single wink,

subtitles.original: ボクの気持ちも知らないで！
subtitles.english: ...while you don't even know my feelings!

subtitles.original: もー！ バズっちゃバズっちゃやぁだ
subtitles.english: Jeez! I don't want it to go viral, go viral.

subtitles.original: ねえ 射抜いて射抜いてずっと
subtitles.english: Hey, shoot through my heart, always.

subtitles.original: いつでもあなたに翻弄中
subtitles.english: I'm always being toyed with by you.

subtitles.original: 誰よりあなたのトクベツでいたいの
subtitles.english: I want to be your most special person of all.

subtitles.original: わがまますぎかな 許してね
subtitles.english: Is that too selfish? Please forgive me.

subtitles.original: あたしひたむきシンデレラ！
subtitles.english: I'm a dedicated Cinderella!

subtitles.original: オトメロディー
subtitles.english: Oto Melody

subtitles.original: スキスキスー フワフワフー
subtitles.english: Suki-suki-su, Fuwa-fuwa-fu

subtitles.original: こんなキモチ メロメロディ
subtitles.english: This feeling is Mero-merody

subtitles.original: 夢だけど 夢じゃない
subtitles.english: It's a dream, but it's not a dream.

subtitles.original: お願いね マイメロディ
subtitles.english: Please, My Melody.

subtitles.original: オトナじゃない オトメです。
subtitles.english: I'm not an adult, I'm a maiden.

subtitles.original: 恋するのが仕事です
subtitles.english: Being in love is my job.

subtitles.original: 君の名前つぶやくと ドキドキするの
subtitles.english: When I mutter your name, my heart pounds.

subtitles.original: 聞き分けない この胸が
subtitles.english: This heart of mine won't listen,

subtitles.original: 歌い出して止まらない
subtitles.english: it starts singing and won't stop.

subtitles.original: 上手じゃなくてゴメンナサイ
subtitles.english: I'm sorry I'm not very good at it.

subtitles.original: だけど聞いて とどけ
subtitles.english: But please listen, let it reach you.

subtitles.original: マイメロディ マイメロディ
subtitles.english: My Melody, My Melody.

subtitles.original: 星空を越えて 君の夢 守るリボン
subtitles.english: Across the starry sky, a ribbon to protect your dreams.

subtitles.original: マイメロディ ハート見つけたなら
subtitles.english: My Melody, if I find your heart,

subtitles.original: グルグル巻きしちゃうからね
subtitles.english: I'll wrap it up tight.

subtitles.original: Wow wow wo 覚悟しといて
subtitles.english: Wow wow wo, be prepared.

subtitles.original: 嘘じゃない
subtitles.english: It's not a lie.

subtitles.original: オトナじゃない オトメです。
subtitles.english: I'm not an adult, I'm a maiden.

subtitles.original: 泣いたりだってしちゃいます
subtitles.english: I even end up crying sometimes.

subtitles.original: 女の子って魔法で 作られたの
subtitles.english: Girls were created from magic.

subtitles.original: スキスキスー フワフワフー
subtitles.english: Suki-suki-su, Fuwa-fuwa-fu

subtitles.original: こんなキモチ メロメロディ
subtitles.english: This feeling is Mero-merody

subtitles.original: 夢だけど 夢じゃない
subtitles.english: It's a dream, but it's not a dream.

subtitles.original: お願いね マイメロディ
subtitles.english: Please, My Melody.

subtitles.original: キライじゃない ってゆーかスキ
subtitles.english: I don't hate you, I mean, I love you.

subtitles.original: スナオになんてなれません
subtitles.english: I just can't be honest.

subtitles.original: 君の笑顔見るだけで フニャフニャするの
subtitles.english: Just seeing your smile makes me go all weak.

subtitles.original: それなのにー それなのに！
subtitles.english: And yet, and yet!

subtitles.original: 憎まれ口 叩きまくり
subtitles.english: I keep saying spiteful things,

subtitles.original: ひとりになって落ち込んで
subtitles.english: then I get depressed when I'm alone,

subtitles.original: 枕パンチ！！ だから
subtitles.english: and punch my pillow!! So...

subtitles.original: マイメロディ マイメロディ
subtitles.english: My Melody, My Melody.

subtitles.original: 本当の気持ち 風になって 結ぶリボン
subtitles.english: My true feelings turn into the wind, a ribbon that binds.

subtitles.original: マイメロディ 歌えオトメゴコロ
subtitles.english: My Melody, sing out, maiden's heart.
